experiment_design.shared_pool: M_all from Phase 0 DECLARE spec (fixed; same as P1 and DRVA)
experiment_design.joint_operator: N_label(ε) ∘ N_struct(ρ): structural log precomputed per ρ row (fixed seed per row); label noise applied per ε cell.
experiment_design.holds_reuse: ρ=0: holds_orig reused. ρ>0: holds computed once per ρ row, shared across all ε.
experiment_design.null_protocol: Doubly-null: σ_label ∘ σ_trace on L_{ε,ρ} (anchor cells only). FROZEN τ_DM*(c) applied to null-log confidences.
experiment_design.DM_FST_gate: |Δconf̂(c)| >= τ_delta_conf = 0.9500  AND (conf0 >= 0.01 OR conf1 >= 0.01). Uniform fixed threshold — no sample-size scaling. τ_delta_conf fixed from original data. No statistical test. No FDR correction.
experiment_design.DM_FST_null_budget: Zero internal permutation iterations per null replicate. DM-FST null reps are fully deterministic given the doubly-null log.

S_orig_full.description: DM-FST acceptance set on original data: {c : |Δconf̂(c)| ≥ τ_DM*(c) AND interestingness guard}. Ground truth for FDR_ref and Recall.

S_orig_rq2.description: DM-FST output at (ε=0, ρ=0) using frozen τ_DM*(c). Jaccard_rq2=1.0 at (0,0) by construction.

speed_optimisations_applied.S2_no_calibration_per_cell: DM-FST is deterministic — O(m) per cell
speed_optimisations_applied.S4_null_reps_deterministic: Zero internal permutation budget per null rep
